allow:
Bash(# Get zone ID for losmilis.com using the account ID
curl -s -X GET "https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/zones?name=losmilis.com&account.id=bb5bedf00b4c28a32e178acec2a22abb" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer dcSHT6PLC0j0hFrdlDhh_ggqvMr9Yzog5epiL47x" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" | python3 -m json.tool 2>&1)

Bash(# Check if the CNAME was created in cloudteco.com zone
curl -s -X GET "https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/zones/d53022d8553e52a89f53a714b0046f8e/dns_records?name=parchis.losmilis.com.cloudteco.com" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer dcSHT6PLC0j0hFrdlDhh_ggqvMr9Yzog5epiL47x" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" | python3 -m json.tool 2>&1)

Bash(# Delete the CNAME from cloudteco.com
curl -s -X GET "https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/zones/d53022d8553e52a89f53a714b0046f8e/dns_records?name=parchis.cloudteco.com" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer dcSHT6PLC0j0hFrdlDhh_ggqvMr9Yzog5epiL47x" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']; print\(r[0]['id'] if r else 'none'\)" 2>&1)
